page_metadata.biotools__summary: Factored Spectrally Transformed Linear Mixed Models is a set of tools for efficiently performing genome-wide association studies (GWAS), prediction, and heritability estimation on large data sets.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Factored Spectrally Transformed Linear Mixed Models is a set of tools for efficiently performing genome-wide association studies (GWAS), prediction, and heritability estimation on large data sets.
